001package guiInviteUsers;
002
003/*******
004 * <p> Title: ModelInviteUsers Class</p>
005 * 
006 * <p> Description: The Model for the Invite Users page. This class manages the data
007 * and business logic for generating invitation codes.</p>
008 * 
009 * <p> Copyright: Lynn Robert Carter © 2025 </p>
010 * 
011 * @author Lynn Robert Carter
012 * 
013 * @version 1.00                2026-02-09 Initial version
014 *  
015 */
016
017public class ModelInviteUsers {
018        
019        private String emailAddress;
020        private String selectedRole;
021        private String generatedCode;
022        
023        /**
024         * Default constructor
025         */
026        public ModelInviteUsers() {
027                this.emailAddress = "";
028                this.selectedRole = "student";
029                this.generatedCode = "";
030        }
031        
032        /**
033         * Get the email address
034         * @return email address string
035         */
036        public String getEmailAddress() {
037                return emailAddress;
038        }
039        
040        /**
041         * Set the email address
042         * @param email the email address to set
043         */
044        public void setEmailAddress(String email) {
045                this.emailAddress = email;
046        }
047        
048        /**
049         * Get the selected role
050         * @return role string
051         */
052        public String getSelectedRole() {
053                return selectedRole;
054        }
055        
056        /**
057         * Set the selected role
058         * @param role the role to set
059         */
060        public void setSelectedRole(String role) {
061                this.selectedRole = role;
062        }
063        
064        /**
065         * Get the generated code
066         * @return generated code string
067         */
068        public String getGeneratedCode() {
069                return generatedCode;
070        }
071        
072        /**
073         * Set the generated code
074         * @param code the code to set
075         */
076        public void setGeneratedCode(String code) {
077                this.generatedCode = code;
078        }
079}
